controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: Information security policies shall be defined, approved by management, published, and communicated to personnel and relevant interested parties. Policies shall be reviewed at planned intervals or upon significant changes.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets shall be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented based on information access restrictions and the specific access control policy. Multi-factor authentication is required for privileged access.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: Protection against malware shall be implemented, supported by appropriate user awareness. Endpoint protection (EPP/EDR) shall be deployed to all company-managed endpoints with daily signature updates.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use shall be obtained, the organization's exposure evaluated, and appropriate measures taken. A vulnerability management process with remediation SLAs shall be maintained.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults, and information security events shall be produced, stored, protected, and analyzed. Logs shall be retained for a minimum of 12 months.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Networks, systems, and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behavior and appropriate actions taken to evaluate potential information security incidents.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented. AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.description: ICT readiness shall be planned, implemented, maintained, and tested based on business continuity objectives and ICT continuity requirements. Includes backups, disaster recovery, and RTO/RPO targets.

controls.title: Information security event reporting
controls.description: The organization shall provide a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected information security events through appropriate channels in a timely manner.
